title: asclepias verticillata var. galioides
intro: Asclepias verticillata var. galioides, also known as the Prairie Milkweed or Whorled Milkweed, is a perennial herb native to North America, belonging to the milkweed family (Asclepiadaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Asclepias verticillata var. galioides include soothing digestive issues, reducing pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it can also be used topically as a salve or cream for wound healing and skin issues.
